official_functions.role: Construct the official Play clientbound set_border_center fixture
Write, decode, and observe the official border center body
Name the packet id assigned in Play clientbound state

invariants: The official Play clientbound table assigns set_border_center to packet id 0x58.
The official Play clientbound protocol codec dispatches the set_border_center id to ClientboundSetBorderCenterPacket.
The official set_border_center body is new center X double followed by new center Z double.
The fixture uses primitive WorldBorder center fields only and does not require initialized Level or runtime world-border state.

The framed bytes, packet table id, body bytes, decoded packet class, decoded center coordinates, Play clientbound packet table, and remaining decode byte counts are generated by the official jar-backed answer artifact.
This contract does not prove world-border runtime behavior, world state, render readiness, or client-load completion.
test_topology_note: rust_test_target names the current case adapter only; the manifest owns the runnable test topology.
stop_boundary: Do not use this framed dispatch/decode contract to infer world-border runtime behavior, world state, render readiness, or client-load completion.
